metric.scale_note: Native logistic D=1 slope-intercept (mirt 1.46.1 metric). a=discrimination, d=intercept, c=guessing (mirt g), u=1; difficulty view b=-d/a (stored for reference, validated on load). Synthetic: point estimates only, no SEs. Seeded regeneration; tags/enemies/stems preserved (only the embedded b-annotation in stems was refreshed).

provenance: Auto-generated mixed 2PL/3PL simulated bank for end-to-end demonstration (multi-domain, guessing, wide difficulty, enemy sets). Synthetic content; not real items.
